parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT json_build_object('total_revenue', COALESCE(SUM(revenue),0), 'total_orders', COUNT(*), 'aov', ROUND(AVG(revenue),2)) FROM orders WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.tenant_id }} AND order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') as revenue_summary,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(p)) FROM (SELECT pr.name, pm.sales, pm.revenue, pm.views FROM product_metrics pm JOIN products pr ON pr.id = pm.product_id WHERE pm.tenant_id = {{ $json.tenant_id }} ORDER BY pm.revenue DESC LIMIT 10) p) as top_products,
  (SELECT row_to_json(g) FROM (SELECT clicks, impressions, spend, revenue, conversions FROM google_ads_metrics WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.tenant_id }} ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) g) as google_ads,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(e)) FROM (SELECT campaign_name, open_rate, click_rate, revenue FROM email_metrics WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.tenant_id }} ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 5) e) as email_campaigns,
  (SELECT json_build_object('total_orders', COUNT(*), 'total_revenue', COALESCE(SUM(revenue),0), 'by_source', json_agg(json_build_object('source', ai_source, 'orders', cnt, 'revenue', rev))) FROM (SELECT ai_source, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(revenue) as rev FROM ai_referrals WHERE tenant_id = {{ $json.tenant_id }} AND converted = true GROUP BY ai_source) sub) as ai_referrals

parameters.content:
## AI Assistant Workflow

POST /api/ai-chat with {tenant_id, question}

1. Classifies question intent (revenue, product, ads, email, AI traffic)
2. Loads relevant data context from PostgreSQL
3. Builds system prompt with live data
4. Calls Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
5. Returns answer with context metadata
